title: OBML
description: A markup language to define the OrionBelt Semantic Layer

customExtension.description: Vendor-keyed extension data — opaque to OrionBelt

vendor.description: Vendor or format identifier (e.g. OSI, GOVERNANCE)

dataObject.description: Unique Data Object Name in the OrionBelt Model

code.description: Database Table Name, View Name or SELECT statement

columns.description: Selected Columns from Database Object to be used in OrionBelt. Column names must be unique within each data object.

joins.description: Connect this Data Object with other Data Objects by defining Joins

description.description: Business description of this data object (semantic layer metadata)

comment.description: Physical database comment (from COMMENT ON TABLE)

owner.description: Owner or responsible party for this data object

countable.description: When true (default), the model synthesizes a grain-anchored row-count measure for this data object (name == label, e.g. 'Sales Count'). Set false to opt out.

countLabel.description: Optional name/label for this object's synthesized count measure (the count's id is its label); overrides the model-level countLabelPattern. The {object} token interpolates the object's display label. Ignored when countable is false.

synonyms.description: Alternative names or terms for this data object (LLM hints)

refresh.description: Freshness contract for the physical table this dataObject maps to. Drives result-cache TTL composition and heartbeat invalidation. See PLAN_freshness_driven_cache.md §5.

mode.description: interval: fixed cadence; heartbeat: irregular + ETL pings; static: never changes

interval.description: Required for mode=interval. ISO 8601 duration or shorthand (1h, 15m, 1d)

anchor.description: Optional HH:MM time-of-day anchor for interval mode

timezone.description: IANA TZ name; only used when anchor is set. Default UTC

maxStaleness.description: Required for mode=heartbeat. Max time between heartbeats before stale

timeGrain.description: Used to truncate a date value to aggregate along a date hierarchy. Must match the TimeGrain enum in models/semantic.py (#85).

numClass.description: Numeric classification hint for LLMs: categorical (IDs/codes — group/filter only), additive (sum-safe — amounts, quantities), non_additive (rates, %, ratios — don't assume SUM)

column.description: Unique Column Name in that Data Object

sqlType.description: Informational: the SQL data type of the column (e.g. VARCHAR, INTEGER, NUMERIC(10,2))

primaryKey.description: Marks this column as part of the data object's primary key (informational; multiple columns may set true to express composite keys)

description.description: Business description of this column (semantic layer metadata)

comment.description: Physical database comment (from COMMENT ON COLUMN)

owner.description: Owner or responsible party for this column

expression.description: When set, the column is computed from an inline SQL expression instead of mapping to a physical column. ``{name}`` placeholders refer to other columns of the same data object (by their label) and are substituted with the referenced column's physical code, table-qualified at codegen. ``code`` becomes optional when ``expression`` is set. Note: SQL syntax is dialect-leaky — pin ``settings.defaultDialect`` if your expression uses vendor-specific functions.

synonyms.description: Alternative names or terms for this column (LLM hints)

secondary.description: Mark this join as a secondary (alternative) path. Secondary joins are excluded from multipath/cycle validation.

pathName.description: Unique name for this join path within the (source, target) pair. Required when secondary is true. Used in queries via usePathNames to select this join.

queryColumn.description: Column reference by dataObject + column pair

staticFilterOperator.description: Filter operator for static model filters — supports both OBML and SQL-style naming

isNull.description: used to include NULL in inlist, notinlist, if set true other value properties are ignored

values.description: no value for set/notSet, one value for comparisons, two values for between/notBetween, list of values for contains/notContains

filterGroup.description: A group of filters combined with AND or OR logic, supporting recursive nesting

logic.description: Boolean combination logic for child filters

filters.description: Child filters (leaf filters or nested filter groups)

negated.description: When true, negates the entire group: NOT (filter1 AND/OR filter2)

resultType.description: Data type of the result (informative only, not used for SQL generation)

via.description: Intermediate data object name. Forces the join path through this data object to reach the dimension's dataObject. Used for role-playing dimensions (e.g., SalesEmployee vs ReturnEmployee).

owner.description: Owner or responsible party for this dimension

synonyms.description: Alternative names or terms for this dimension (LLM hints)

grainMode.description: Grain mode: FIXED starts empty, RELATIVE inherits query dimensions

grainOverride.description: Grain override — controls aggregation grain independently from query dimensions

mode.description: FIXED: start with empty grain (include adds). RELATIVE: start with query dims (exclude removes).

exclude.description: Dimension names to remove from inherited grain (RELATIVE mode only)

include.description: Dimension names to add. With FIXED: these are the grain. With RELATIVE: added to inherited.

keepOnly.description: With FIXED: adaptive grain = keepOnly ∩ query_dims. Dimensions from this list present in the query.

filterContextMode.description: Filter context mode: FIXED ignores all query filters, RELATIVE inherits them

filterContextFilter.description: A static filter to include in a filter context

op.description: Filter operator (equals, notequals, gt, gte, lt, lte, inlist, etc.)

filterContext.description: Filter context override — controls which query WHERE filters apply to this measure

mode.description: FIXED: ignore all query filters. RELATIVE (default): inherit query filters.

exclude.description: Field names — query filters referencing these fields are removed (RELATIVE mode only)

include.description: Static filters to add to this measure's context

keepOnly.description: Only query filters referencing these fields are kept

columns.description: Columns used in Measure for Aggregation

resultType.description: Data type of the result (informative only, not used for SQL generation)

aggregation.description: Aggregation function. Core: sum, count, count_distinct, avg, min, max, any_value, median, mode, listagg. Statistical (v2.6+): stddev, stddev_pop, variance, var_pop (single-column), corr, covar_pop, covar_samp, regr_slope, regr_intercept (two-column). Vendor delegation (v2.7.7+): measure (Databricks Metric Views only; emits MEASURE("<label>") and forbids columns/expression/filters/total). Dialect support varies: MySQL lacks correlation/covariance/regression; BigQuery and ClickHouse lack regr_slope/regr_intercept; only Databricks accepts 'measure'.

withinGroup.description: WITHIN GROUP clause to specify column for ordering in LISTAGG

allowFanOut.description: allow fan out for this measure, only applicable if measures can't reach dimensions but dimensions can reach measures for a specific grain

total.description: will use the total value of the measure

grain.description: Grain override — controls aggregation grain independently from query dimensions. Mutually exclusive with 'total'.

filterContext.description: Filter context override — controls which query WHERE filters apply to this measure. Requires CTE isolation.

expression.description: template string with {[DataObject].[Column]} placeholders for measure expression

filters.description: Filters applied to this measure (combined with AND by default). Supports leaf filters and filter groups with AND/OR/NOT logic.

owner.description: Owner or responsible party for this measure

synonyms.description: Alternative names or terms for this measure (LLM hints)

dataType.description: Explicit OBML data type for this measure (e.g. decimal(18, 2), bigint). Overrides automatic type inference.

cumulativeAggType.description: Window aggregation function for cumulative metrics

grainToDate.description: Reset boundary for grain-to-date cumulative metrics

periodOverPeriod.description: Period-over-period configuration — compares a measure against a prior time period

timeDimension.description: Name of the time dimension used for period comparison (must be in SELECT)

grain.description: Time grain for the date spine (e.g. month, quarter, year)

offset.description: Number of periods to look back (negative = past, e.g. -1 = previous period)

offsetGrain.description: Unit for the offset (e.g. year for YoY, month for MoM)

comparison.description: How to compare current vs previous period value

metric.description: Metric definition. A derived metric (expression referencing measures), a cumulative metric (window function over a measure), or a period-over-period metric (comparing a measure across time periods).

type.description: Metric category: derived (expression-based), cumulative (windowed aggregation over a measure), period_over_period (time comparison), or window (rank/lag/lead/ntile/first_value/last_value).

expression.description: Template string with {[Measure Name]} placeholders (required for derived and period_over_period metrics)

measure.description: Name of base measure (required for cumulative metrics)

timeDimension.description: Dimension used for ordering (required for cumulative metrics, must be a date/timestamp dimension)

window.description: Rolling window size in periods (omit for unbounded running total). Mutually exclusive with grainToDate.

grainToDate.description: Reset boundary for grain-to-date (e.g. month for MTD). Mutually exclusive with window.

partitionBy.description: Dimensions used as PARTITION BY keys for cumulative or window metrics. Each entry must be a dimension defined in the model and selected in the query. Default: [] (no partition).

orderDirection.description: Window ORDER BY direction (default 'desc' for ranking; 'asc' is natural for ROW_NUMBER over time)

defaultValue.description: Default value for LAG/LEAD (NULL when omitted)

owner.description: Owner or responsible party for this metric

synonyms.description: Alternative names or terms for this metric (LLM hints)

dataType.description: Explicit OBML data type for this metric (e.g. decimal(18, 4)). Overrides automatic type inference.

name.description: Optional addressing identifier for multi-model mode. After normalization (lowercase; spaces/dots/dashes -> underscores; trimmed) must match ^[a-z][a-z0-9_]{0,62}$. Selected by BI tools via the Flight `database` catalog or pgwire `database=` parameter.

description.description: Business description of this semantic model

dataObjects.description: Data Object Names in the OrionBelt Model

measures.description: Measures for use in Queries or referenced by Metrics

owner.description: Owner or responsible party for this model

exposeCounts.description: When true (default), synthesize a row-count measure for every countable data object. Set false to suppress all synthesized counts. Declared measures are unaffected.

countLabelPattern.description: Name/label template for synthesized count measures (the count's id is its label). The only valid token is {object}, which interpolates each object's display label (e.g. 'Sales' -> 'Sales Count'). A per-object countLabel overrides it.

filters.description: Static WHERE filters applied to every query against this model

dataObject.description: Data object containing the filter column

column.description: Column name within the data object

value.description: Single filter value. Dates and timestamps use ISO 8601 strings (e.g. '2026-01-01', '2026-01-01T14:30:00Z'). Bare YAML dates are auto-coerced to ISO strings at load time.

values.description: List of filter values (for in/between operators). Dates use ISO 8601 strings.

examples.description: Canonical example queries authored alongside the model. Surfaced via the /examples endpoints so agents can discover what kinds of questions the model is designed to answer. See PLAN_agent_api_improvements.md §5.

name.description: Snake_case identifier, unique within the examples block

description.description: One- or two-sentence explanation of what this example shows

intentTags.description: Free-form tags used by the /examples?intent= filter

query.description: Full QueryObject payload (the same shape accepted by /query/sql)

extends.description: List of OBML files to merge as analytical layers (dimensions, measures, metrics). Extend files must not contain dataObjects.

inherits.description: Path to a parent OBML model to inherit all definitions from. The parent provides dataObjects, joins, dimensions, measures, metrics, and filters. The child can add or override analytical definitions and append static filters.

settings.description: Model-level settings for compilation and execution behavior

defaultNumericDataType.description: Default numeric data type for measures/metrics without explicit data_type. Must be a decimal type (e.g. decimal(18, 4)).

defaultTimezone.description: IANA timezone name (e.g. Europe/Zagreb, America/New_York). Used as fallback for naive timestamps when DB session timezone cannot be detected, or as override when overrideDatabaseTimezone is true.

overrideDatabaseTimezone.description: If true, use defaultTimezone instead of the auto-detected database session timezone. Use when naive timestamps are stored in a known timezone that differs from the DB session. Default: false.

defaultDialect.description: Default SQL dialect for queries that omit the 'dialect' field. Resolution order at request time: explicit dialect → model.settings.defaultDialect → DB_VENDOR env. Must be one of the registered OrionBelt dialects.

defaultLocale.description: Default BCP-47 locale tag (e.g. 'en-US', 'de-DE') for result value formatting. Resolution at request time: explicit ?locale= -> settings.defaultLocale -> DEFAULT_LOCALE env.

customExtensions.description: Vendor-keyed extension data at model level
